title: polygala butyracea
intro: Polygala butyracea, also known as yuan zhi or polygala root, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the milkwort family (Polygalaceae). It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, anti-anxiety, and anti-depressive effects. The root of the Polygala butyracea plant is used to treat a range of health issues, including anxiety, insomnia, and cardiovascular disease, due to its ability to promote relaxation, reduce stress, and improve overall well-being. Herbal preparations of Polygala butyracea include teas, capsules, and tinctures, which can be used to support mental and physical health.
